chunks.page_summary: This page provides a detailed engineering drawing with dimensions and technical specifications for the Rheonics SRV-short sanitary/aseptic viscometer and density sensor, including available flange types, surface finish requirements, and EHEDG compliance criteria.

key_facts: The SRV-short sensor is designed for sanitary and aseptic connections.
The sensor is available with various flange types including DIN11853, DIN11864, DIN 11851, and ISO 2852, as well as proprietary options like Variline® and BoiControl®.
All wetted surfaces of the sensor must have a roughness average (Ra) less than 0.8.
The device is protected by US and International patents that are both granted and pending.
Rheonics manufactures inline process density and viscosity monitoring equipment.
warnings_notes: This drawing remains the property of Rheonics and may not be copied, shared with third parties, or provided to competitors without Rheonics' approval, as per 2 paragraph 1 fig.7 of the copyright act of 9th Sept. 1965.
The product is protected by US and International patents, which are granted and pending.
For EHEDG compliance, the criterion 'ΦD - 14mm > L' must be fulfilled.
